title: Lease R&D Space
description: Collocate your R&D center in a well-equipped building inside the scenic IITB campus for the strongest possible academic interaction [Resident Members only]. Avail a co-working space for a temporary, few-person collaboration.

title: State of the art facilities
description: Tap into robust government and donor support for translational research, with streamlined access to IIT Bombay’s advanced research infrastructure. (Exclusive to Resident Members)

title: Multidisciplinary expertise
description: Engage in IIT Bombay–industry thematic forums to explore collaborative opportunities across diverse domains.

title: Intellectual Capital
description: Engage top student talent from across India and collaborate with world-class IIT Bombay faculty across diverse technology domains.

title: Library Access
description: Access to print media at the Library.

title: Matchmaking
description: Receive tailored matchmaking support to align your requirements with IIT Bombay’s available expertise and capabilities.

title: Exchange of Knowledge
description: Leverage IIT Bombay’s world-class educational programs to upskill your workforce (Exclusive to Resident Members). Contribute to IITB’s academic ecosystem by nominating your experts as guest or visiting faculty.

title: Handholding
description: Receive dedicated guidance throughout the process of formalising your partnerships with various IIT Bombay offices, including R&D and Educational Outreach.

title: Entrepreneurship Ecosystem
description: Connect with the dynamic entrepreneurship ecosystem at IIT Bombay and the vibrant Powai community.
